props.name: content
props.type: (ReactNode[] | { cells: ReactNode[]; actions: readonly (ReactElement<unknown, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>> | CardAction)[]; })[]

props.name: responsive
props.description:
In mobile, the table will be scrollable horizontally by default. Alternatively, you can set it to 'collapse-rows', which will
render every row as a card

props.name: fullWidth
props.description:
By default, the table expands to all the available width, if you want the table to have the minimum width to fit the rows content, set fullWidth to false.
It's ignored in mobile

props.name: maxHeight
props.description:
Limits the height of the table and the content will have vertical scroll.
It's ignored in mobile when responsive move is 'collapse-rows'

props.name: scrollOverResponsiveLayout
props.description: When rendering the table inside a responsive layout, you can enable this prop to make the table scrollable over the layout paddings

props.name: hideHeaders
props.description: Used to hide headers from UI. Screen readers will still recognize them when reading an element from the table.

props.name: dataAttributes
props.description: "data-" prefix is automatically added. For example, use "testid" instead of "data-testid"
